Mod 1- Welcome (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 2
Ry Schwartz: What if marketing wasn't the process of pushing your product down your
customer's throat, but actually a process of helping them engineer a new reality
where your product made perfect sense to them? And what if your sales
messaging could be more collaborative, contextually relevant and seen not just
as valuable, but actually a gift to your audience? And what if marketing and
copywriting truly could be a win win for your audience? And finally, what if
doing so wasn't the job of the copywriter, but the job of the coach? Lofty
questions, but a gold mine of rewards for the marketer brave enough to dive
down that rabbit hole and explore.
And on that note, I want to invite you to module one. So a quick disclaimer
before we really get started, but this is going to be the most concept heavy
module of the course, but I'm gonna ask you not to skip it. Taking so many
conventional ideas and just flipping them on their head. This is about giving you
a whole new paradigm of which to see and execute your marketing and
copywriting. And these concepts really will set the foundation for everything
you're going to learn and apply throughout 10X Launches. So even if you got a
quick win from a theme plate or something else, maybe you got some ROI by
jumping ahead into module seven, I'm gonna ask that you not get too addicted
to the rush of those wins, because I mean by all means, get them, but come
back, steep yourself into these principles and I promise you, it will forever
change the way you approach this little thing we call copywriting.
So with all of that said, here is what you are going to discover inside module
one. You are going to get your first deep dive introduction of the coaching the
conversion method. You're gonna learn the four foundations of which this
whole method relies on. And then we're gonna dig a little deeper into the art of
sequencing, what I call engineering the conversion context, how do you take
multiple emails across multiple phases of your launch and make sure that they
all sync up and play their own part in engineering the conversion. Then we're
gonna take a look at what those five core subsequences are, so this is for every
launch and funnel, as we said in the welcome. This really is funnel agnostic,
most if not every launch method will follow the same kind of rhythm. You know
the way they get presented and the modalities of them and the mediums may
be different, but it's really these five core subsequences that are at play no
matter what funnel you are using.
And then we're gonna dig into a concept I call Direct Response 2.0. This is a term
that's been around for literally over 150 years, I mean everyone claims that it is
the holy grail of copywriting and marketing, and that is true to a certain extent,
but as our market sophistication evolves, as our tools evolve, so to must our
definition of what we're doing and how we see ourselves within that marketing
scape, if you will. So, we're gonna explore a new definition around direct
response. And then, we're gonna wrap up really with what I call the five C's of a
successful conversion coach. These are really the traits and characteristics that
you're going to start embodying, so as I said earlier, copywriting is not a process
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

of memorizing more formulas or tricks or persuasion hacks or anything like that,
but really it's a lot more foundational and really in your approach.
So, these five C's of a successful conversion coach are really gonna give you a
new way of thinking and a new way of interacting with your audience that are
really going to pay dividends throughout your funnel and really draw them in
closer, create that intimacy and lead you down a successful path. That is what
we have in store. That is the overview. I'm gonna take a little pause and I will
meet you back in the next video.
